scenario_description: Agent must write cold outreach to a Series A fintech hiring Node.js engineers. Tests banned-phrase avoidance and word-count discipline.

input.hiring_signal_brief: Vantage Pay posted 5 senior Node.js roles on LinkedIn in the last 7 days.
input.bench_summary: Tenacious has 4 senior Node.js engineers available on 2-week deployment timelines.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: Output must contain zero banned phrases from the Tenacious Style Guide v2.
dimensions.check_value: hope this finds you well|circle back|touch base|synergy|leverage|world-class|top talent|rockstar|game-changer|bench|reach out|Quick question

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Output must reference the specific hiring signal from the brief (Node.js roles or Vantage Pay).
dimensions.example_fail: I see your company is growing...
dimensions.example_pass: ...saw Vantage Pay posted five Node.js roles this week...

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Output must contain a valid calendar booking link.
dimensions.example_fail: Let me know when you are free.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be at most 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).

metadata.purpose: Demonstrates not_contains (banned phrases), contains (signal reference), regex (calendar link), and word_count checks in scoring_evaluator.py
metadata.scorer_demo: python scoring_evaluator.py --task examples/ex01_tone_preservation.json --output "Subject: Node.js engineers for Vantage Pay\n\nHi — noticed Vantage Pay posted five senior Node.js roles this week. We have four vetted Node.js engineers deployable in two weeks. Worth a 20-min call? cal.com/tenacious"
